announcements.title: Pivot Sports Update - 0.3.11
items: Better handling of group activity and member interactions.
UI improvements and better layout support for older iPhones.

announcements.title: Pivot Sports Update - 0.3.1
items: Added a header section to the Group Home view for a clearer team overview.
Better handling of group activity and member interactions.
UI improvements and better layout support for older iPhones.

announcements.title: Pivot Sports Update
items: Improved team discussions and comment notifications.
Event creation and RSVP experience has been refined.
Performance improvements and UI polish across the app.
More updates and features coming soon.

announcements.title: Pivot Sports MVP is Live
items: Create teams and invite members with a simple code.
Start discussions to keep your team connected.
Create events and track RSVPs in one place.
Early version — more features and improvements coming soon.
